current_commit_message: Use default constructor to create test data
Move related field resolution to views
Fix support for nullable related fields
Add support for custom item classes in Related
Allow changing expected Authorization header_prefix in subclasses of JwtAuthentication
Allow resources with trailing slashes (DRF style) (#86)
Explicit use of view model in get_item (#88)
Also include debug information when testing
Add overridable view method for resolving related
Add support for pagination meta for items
use feature detection for marshmallow version
use load default if marshmallow version field is removed
use importlib.metadata to get module version
